title: ipomoea cinerea
intro: Ipomoea cinerea, also known as the gray morning glory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea cinerea include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Ipomoea cinerea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
